adapters.label: Email Phase 1 transport adapter (low-frequency coordination)
adapters.description: Practical carrier for fragmented agencies: low-frequency decision packet sharing, task handoffs, acknowledgements, and status updates. Not suitable for high-frequency sensor streams or sensitive personal data without stronger controls.
adapters.audit_behavior: Record Message-ID mapping to message_id/receipt_id; retain delivery receipts for audit.
adapters.retry_behavior: Human-in-the-loop retries; idempotent message_id; conservative backoff.
adapters.notes: Email is a transport adapter, not the Network Layer.

adapters.label: API/Webhook adapter
adapters.audit_behavior: Persist delivery receipts with webhook delivery ids; expose audit trails to ops only.
adapters.retry_behavior: Exponential backoff + dead-letter; idempotent message_id handling.

adapters.label: File drop adapter
adapters.audit_behavior: Record file path/handle as transport_message_ref; preserve receipts.
adapters.retry_behavior: At-least-once delivery with dedup on message_id; backoff via scheduler.
